subcodes.first_line: O my God! I beseech Thee by Thy Name which Thou hast made sovereign over all names, to ordain for me that which shall profit me [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا الهی اسئلک باسمک الدی جعلته مهیمنا علی کل الاسماء بان تقدر لی ما ینفعنی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for forgiveness, @service to others; to the Cause of God
